eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Worth, MO; at 8:36 AM on JUN 13, 2026 Effective until 10:36 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: SEVERE THUNDERSTORM WARNING UNTIL 11:15. Storm will include high winds, hail and heavy rains. The next series of storms will come through our area around midafternoon.
